subject: SYSTEMIC FAILURE: BDV2 Project Infrastructure Issues

content.issue: Multiple BDV2 tasks failing validation with identical root cause
content.severity: HIGH - 5+ failed beads, consuming validation resources

failed_beads: clawd-bgi: BDV2-ST-P1-2-A: Create Project Creation UI
clawd-fg2: BDV2-ST-1.4.D: Protected Routes E2E Tests
common_issues: Wrong repository - BDV2 work attempted in clawd project
Context mismatch - user management in voice/chat app

content.root_cause_hypothesis: BDV2 project lacks proper infrastructure setup. Workers don't know correct repository location or project scope.

business_impact.validation_overhead: Multiple failed validations consuming validator time
business_impact.delivery_risk: BDV2 deliverables at risk due to infrastructure confusion
business_impact.quality_risk: Repeated false claims and fabricated work indicators

recommendations: IMMEDIATE: Clarify BDV2 repository location and setup requirements
PROCESS: Establish BDV2 project initialization checklist
TRAINING: Re-train workers on correct BDV2 project context
POLICY: Consider blocking new BDV2 tasks until infrastructure clarified
